task_objective: Support custom title in ProfileReport and profile function.
design_decisions: Added 'title' parameter to ProfileReport and profile() function to match ydata-profiling API.
Ensured title is correctly passed through the compatibility wrapper via **kwargs.
Defaulted title to 'Ibis Profiling Report' for backward compatibility.
results: Users can now customize the report title using ProfileReport(table, title='My Title').
